title: Spicy Crispy Sweet Potato Toast
description: A dairy-free friendly and sick-day Jamaican-inspired dish featuring crispy sweet potatoes topped with a spicy, savory Chinese five spice glaze for added flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons vegetable oil or coconut oil
ingredients.amount: mixed with a pinch of salt and ground black pepper

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the cubed sweet potato with oil, salt, and black pepper. Toss well to coat evenly.
Transfer the coated sweet potatoes onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
Bake for about 25-30 minutes, flipping halfway through until they are crispy and golden brown on all sides.
While the sweet potatoes are baking, prepare the glaze by mixing together Chinese five spice powder, lime juice, and a pinch of ground cayenne pepper (if using).
Once the sweet potatoes are done, drizzle them with the glaze mixture immediately while they're still hot for best results.
Let the sweet potatoes cool slightly before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
